name: Mai Shiranui

skills.name: HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI
skills.description: Periodically gains an enhanced Basic Attack that lets her dash while dealing damage and knocking back enemies in her path. After using an enhanced Basic Attack or any skill, she can roll and gain Movement Speed.

skills.name: HISHOU RYUUENJIN
skills.description: Dashes forward to deal damage and launch enemies in the target area. Recovers Energy upon hit.

skills.name: KACHOUSEN
skills.description: Throws her fan to damage and slow a target enemy while reducing their Magical Defense. Hits recover Energy. After it hits, the fan also deals magical damage to the closest unit behind the target.

skills.name: CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI
skills.description: Dashes forward to deal damage and knock back enemies while reducing their Physical Attack. Recovers Energy upon hitting a target.

tips: Mai Shiranui is a Medium Assassin (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 48.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Scepter of Reverberation → Boots of Resistance → Savant's Wrath → Insatiable Tome → Void Staff → Splendor.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Mai Shiranui's Assassin kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: HISHOU RYUUENJIN → KACHOUSEN → CHOU HISSATSU SHINOBI-BACHI → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Mai Shiranui excels into Chano, Lapulapu, Ata. Avoid blind picking into Alessio, Charlotte, Di Renjie without team peel.

Mai Shiranui is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Mai Shiranui good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Mai Shiranui is Tier A Assassin with 48.7% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Mai Shiranui build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of Resistance, Savant's Wrath, Insatiable Tome, Void Staff, Splendor. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Mai Shiranui?
faqs.answer: Pick Alessio, Charlotte, Di Renjie into Mai Shiranui. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Mai Shiranui completes core items. Mai Shiranui struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Mai Shiranui counter?
faqs.answer: Mai Shiranui is strong into Chano, Lapulapu, Ata according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Mai Shiranui when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Mai Shiranui good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Mai Shiranui is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Mai Shiranui play?
faqs.answer: Mai Shiranui is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Assassin, Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Mai Shiranui?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Mai Shiranui or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Mai Shiranui vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 1.0% more often globally. Choose Mai Shiranui when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Mai Shiranui?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.2%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.
